name: @foss-tasks/domain
description: Pure domain logic shared by the Device and the backend write path (ADR-0004, ADR-0008 §11)
//: Consumed through `main`, not `exports`: Metro's package-exports support is behind a flag in RN 0.76, while `main` resolves everywhere. Ships compiled JS because raw TypeScript cannot satisfy both consumers — services/* use NodeNext (relative imports need a .js extension) and Metro rejects the .js->.ts mapping.
